description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 8, 2026 at 7:36 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving a pickup truck on S. Mansfield Avenue near Westhaven Street. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound on a narrow portion of S. Mansfield Avenue, with vehicles parked at the curb in both directions, 
when it maneuvered to the right and slowed to a  stop in-lane to yield to a pickup truck traveling northbound on S. Mansfield Avenue. 
While the Waymo AV was stopped, the pickup truck proceeded to pass the Waymo AV to the left, and the left side of the pickup truck 
made contact with the rear left side of the stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in 
autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
